channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Dean McLachlan Announces Retirement From Mushroom Group
item.description: 🍄 Goodbye to the legend! Wishing Dean McLachlan a rockin' retirement after years of legendary music magic! 🎸 #DeanMcLachlan #MusicLegend

item.title: De La Soul Bring Magic to Career-Spanning Tiny Desk Concert: Watch
item.description: 🎤✨ Get ready to groove with De La Soul's mesmerizing Tiny Desk Concert performance! Watch now and feel the magic! 🎶 #DeLaSoul #TinyDeskConcert

item.title: The Mountain Goats announce Carnegie Hall show
item.description: 🏛️ Big news! 🐐 The Mountain Goats are taking over Carnegie Hall with an epic show! Who's ready to rock out? 🎸 #MountainGoatsNYC

item.title: Ringo Starr Hits the ‘Long Long Road’ on New Album With Sheryl Crow, Billy Strings, St. Vincent
item.description: 🥁✨ Ringo Starr takes us down the 'Long Long Road' with star-studded collabs! 🌟💫 #RockIcons #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Charli XCX, the Strokes, the xx, and More Performing at Outside Lands 2026
item.description: Get ready to dance under the stars 🌟 Exciting lineup alert: Charli XCX, The Strokes, The xx, and more at Outside Lands 2026! 🎶🎉 #MusicFestivalFun
